data.text: This is a very long content string that contains many words and might span multiple lines in the actual rendering but should still be parsed correctly as a single content value even with special characters like quotes " and backslashes \

properties.data: var(--shadow-x, 0) var(--shadow-y, 5px) var(--shadow-blur, 10px) var(--shadow-spread, 0) var(--shadow-color, rgba(0,0,0,0.3))

data.gradient: conic-gradient(red, yellow, lime, aqua, blue, magenta, red)

data.value: open-quote attr(data-author) " said: " open-quote attr(data-quote) close-quote close-quote

data.gradient: linear-gradient(45deg, red, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, violet)

data.raw: blur(5px) brightness(1.2) contrast(1.1) drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)) grayscale(0.1) hue-rotate(45deg) invert(0.05) opacity(0.95) saturate(1.2) sepia(0.1) url(#customFilter)

data.original: var(--a, var(--b, var(--c, var(--d, var(--e, red)))))

data.raw: color-mix(in srgb, color-mix(in srgb-linear, color-mix(in display-p3, color-mix(in a98-rgb, color-mix(in prophoto-rgb, color-mix(in rec2020, red, blue), green), yellow), cyan), magenta), white)

data.text: He said "Hello, World!" and she replied "Hi!"
